g.text: SDOF: m = 2 kg, k = 8000 N/m, c = 5 N.s/m

text.style: font-size: 10px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans', 'Bitstream Vera Sans', 'Computer Modern Sans Serif', 'Lucida Grande', 'Verdana', 'Geneva', 'Lucid', 'Arial', 'Helvetica', 'Avant Garde', sans-serif; fill: #ffffff

g.text: H = 1/(k - w^2 m + j w c)
